data.title: Alibaba Group Will Announce March Quarter 2026 and Full Fiscal Year 2026 Results on May 13, 2026
data.description: Alibaba Group Holding Limited (NYSE: BABA and HKEX: 9988 (HKD Counter) and 89988 (RMB Counter)) announced plans to release its unaudited financial results for the quarter and fiscal year ending March 31, 2026 before the U.S. market opens on Wednesday, May 13, 2026. A conference call to discuss the financial results will be held at 7:30 a.m. U.S. Eastern Time (7:30 p.m. Hong Kong Time) on the same day. Participants are required to pre-register for the call.

data.description: Josh D’Amaro, who assumed the position in February, is tasked with guiding Disney amidst heightened scrutiny from the president.

data.title: Judge inquires if Justice Department will challenge Trump's $10B lawsuit against IRS for revealing his tax returns.
data.description: A judge from the federal court has directed the Justice Department to clarify its stance on challenging President Trump's lawsuit worth $10 billion against the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) regarding the release of his tax returns.

data.title: U.K. Enterprises Expand Governed Salesforce AI Adoption
data.description: In London, according to ISG, U.K. companies are enlarging the overhaul of Salesforce setups while integrating self-governing procedures and updating customer services. This shift towards autonomous workflows and modernization of operations is gaining momentum, highlighting a growing trend among businesses to enhance their Salesforce environments.

data.title: Ooma AirDial Enhances Remote Device Management with New Monitoring, Visibility and Analytics Features
data.description: Ooma, Inc., a prominent communications solutions provider for businesses and consumers, unveiled advancements to its Remote Device Management (RDM) platform for Ooma AirDial® in Sunnyvale, California. Specifically targeting POTS replacement, the upgrades within AirDial 2 aim to offer enhanced visibility, control, and reliability for key analog devices. The new features cater to ensuring improved monitoring and management of critical operations, catering to organizations seeking to optimize their systems. These developments underline Ooma’s commitment to delivering innovative solutions tailored to the evolving needs of businesses and consumers in the communication sector.

data.title: Parents are pushing for more control over digital tools in schools, winning rollbacks across cities like Salt Lake City and New York.
data.description: Parents across the country, from Salt Lake City to New York City, are calling for increased control over the digital tools provided to their children in schools. This widespread demand underscores the importance of parental involvement in shaping the educational experience, with families advocating for a greater role in decision-making regarding technology use in schools. The movement is gaining momentum as more parents seek to ensure that their children have safe and effective digital learning environments.

data.title: Dunkin’® Brings Warmer-Weather Sips into Focus with New Refreshers, a First-of-Its-Kind Dirty Soda and All-New Coffee Chillers
data.description: Dunkin’ is launching a menu for the spring and summer seasons, including new drinks and bakery items available across the nation starting today. The highlights of the menu include Black Cherry and Limeade Dunkin’ Refreshers, Dirty Soda, beverages with OREO® cookies, revamped Coffee Chillers, and fruit punch bakery items. The seasonal offerings aim to complement the warmer days ahead with a variety of options for customers to choose from.
